THERE WAS SOME NEARBY ROOF DAMAGE AND TREES UPROOTED IN ADDITION TO THE PREVIOUSLY REPORTED DAMAGES. A MORE DETAILED REPORT WILL BE ISSUED BY THE TEAM LATER TODAY.
